title: MotifGate: a PWM-aware residual learning model for TFBS prediction
description: MotifGate is an interpretable, lightweight model for transcription-factor binding-site (TFBS) prediction in short windows (K = 7-14 bp). It combines an exact, differentiable position-weight-matrix (PWM) prior with a learned residual branch gated by a single trainable scalar, so the magnitude of the learned correction over the interpretable prior is directly measurable. This record archives the reproducible software package: the model, training and evaluation pipeline, leakage-controlled split construction, real-TFBS negative sampling, interpretability and calibration analyses, baseline comparison scripts, the UniBind external-validation pipeline, and the statistical-significance, gate-extraction and ablation analyses. Data derive from public resources (JASPAR and UniBind); no new experimental data were generated.
